items.name: SplitDir
items.signature: pub enum SplitDir { H, V }  /// A recursive tree node representing either a leaf panel or a split container. #[derive(Debug, Clone)] /// P an el no de enum. pub enum PanelNode
items.doc:
Direction of a layout split: horizontal (columns) or vertical (rows).
S pl it di r enum.

items.name: PanelNode
items.doc:
A recursive tree node representing either a leaf panel or a split container.
P an el no de enum.

items.name: ratio
items.doc: Return the ratio weight of this node, whether leaf or split.

items.name: parse
items.doc:
Parse a DSL string into a PanelNode tree.
Top-level is always an HSplit if ":" is present, VSplit if only "/" is present.
